message:
🧹 Wire isRefreshing in 11 card components for refresh spinner animation (#10252)

Destructure isRefreshing from data hooks and pass to useCardLoadingState()
in 11 cards that were missing it. This enables the refresh spinner icon
animation when background data updates are in progress.

Also exposed isRefreshing through useMultiClusterInsights hook.

Ratchet baselines lowered: total 65→45, isRefreshing 17→0.

Fixes #10250

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

     hasAnyData: clusters.length > 0,
     isFailed,
